title: Restoring your purchase
description: How to restore your WagerProof Pro subscription if it's not showing up.

content.text: If you're a Pro subscriber but your access isn't showing up (for example, after reinstalling the app or switching devices), you can restore your purchase.

steps.title: Make sure you're signed in
steps.description: Ensure you're logged in with the same account you used to subscribe.

steps.title: Go to Account settings
steps.description: Navigate to your account or settings page.

steps.title: Tap 'Restore Purchases'
steps.description: The app will check with your App Store or Play Store account and restore your Pro access.

content.text: If restoring doesn't work, make sure you're using the same Apple ID or Google account that was used for the original purchase.
If you continue to have issues, contact support@wagerproof.bet with your account email and purchase receipt.
